rows.label: qev093208_MSG0010
rows.name:
The suids we need for pepperoni
tend to congregate at Sayram
Lake in Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093208_MSG0020
rows.name:
We could use another type of meat, but
well, it's kind of the house specialty...
Could you bag us one of those porkers?[ST:wait ]
